Hero.subheadline: Skip the boilerplate. Get production-ready codebases, UI kits, and premium IT services to launch your next big project in days, not months.

FeaturedProducts.title: Featured Products
FeaturedProducts.subtitle: Top-rated source code and starter kits.

Services.title: Professional IT Services
Services.subtitle: Need help bringing your vision to life? Our team of experts is ready to assist with setup, customization, and hosting.
Services.setupDesc: We'll deploy the source code to your servers, configure the database, and ensure everything runs perfectly.
Services.customDesc: Need extra features? We can modify our existing products or build entirely new modules tailored to your needs.
Services.hostingDesc: High-performance VPS hosting optimized for our products. Includes daily backups, SSL, and monitoring.

WhyChooseUs.title: Why developers choose SourceHub
WhyChooseUs.subtitle: We believe in providing clean, scalable, and maintainable code. Our products are built by senior engineers following industry best practices.
WhyChooseUs.feature1Desc: Thoroughly tested, typed, and documented codebases that you can deploy immediately.
WhyChooseUs.feature2Desc: Built with the latest stable versions of Next.js, React, .NET, and PostgreSQL.
WhyChooseUs.feature3Desc: Direct access to the developers who built the products via our dedicated support portal.

Footer.description: Premium source code and developer services to accelerate your next big project. Built for modern teams.

Products.title: Explore Products
Products.subtitle: Find the perfect source code, boilerplate, and UI kit for your next project.

Dashboard.welcomeDesc: Here is a summary of the system's activity today.
Dashboard.servicesDesc: Track the progress of customer IT services.

Pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
Pricing.subtitle: Choose the perfect plan for your project and team.
Pricing.hobbyDesc: Perfect for side projects and indie hackers.
Pricing.proDesc: For teams that need to move fast and scale.
Pricing.enterpriseDesc: Unlimited access and support for large companies.

ServicesPage.title: Professional IT Services
ServicesPage.subtitle: We don't just provide code. Our expert team is ready to help you deploy your project perfectly.
ServicesPage.customDevDesc: Build custom features or an entire product based on your specific business requirements.
ServicesPage.vpsHostingDesc: VPS setup, Nginx configuration, security, and performance optimization.
ServicesPage.maintenanceDesc: Technology updates, security patches, and 24/7 system stability monitoring.
ServicesPage.contactDesc: Tell us about your idea. We'll get back to you within 24 hours.

About.title: About SourceHub
About.subtitle: We build tools to help developers save time and ship excellent products.
About.missionDesc: To make software development easier and more precise by providing world-class boilerplate codebases.
About.teamDesc: We are engineers and designers with years of experience working at top tech companies.

Terms.title: Terms of Service
Terms.subtitle: Last updated: October 2026
Terms.licenseDesc: When you purchase a product on SourceHub, you are granted a license to use the source code for personal or commercial projects. You may not resell the raw source code.
Terms.refundDesc: Due to the nature of digital products, we do not offer refunds once the source code has been downloaded, unless there is a critical unresolvable flaw in the product.
Terms.supportDesc: All products come with 6 months of technical support and bug updates. For new feature requests, please use our custom development services.

Billing.title: Subscription & Billing
Billing.noPlanDesc: Upgrade your plan to unlock premium features and access exclusive resources.

Profile.title: My Profile
Profile.subtitle: Manage your account settings and subscriptions.
Profile.twoFactorDesc: Secure your account by requiring a 6-digit code from Google Authenticator when logging in.
Profile.step1: 1. Install the Google Authenticator app on your phone.
Profile.step2: 2. Open the app and scan this QR code.
Profile.step3: 3. Enter the 6-digit code generated by the app below to confirm.
Profile.failVerify: Invalid verification code. Please try again.
Profile.confirmDisable: Are you sure you want to disable 2-Factor Authentication?
